languages.text: "С тебя три гильзы. Присяга случилась в наш Призыв".
"You owe me three casings. The Oath happened during our Call-Up."
languages.original_text: "С тебя три гильзы. Присяга случилась в наш Призыв".

traits.locale_text: "You owe me three casings. The Oath happened during our Call-Up."
"You owe me three casings. The Oath happened during our Call-Up."
"You owe me three casings. The Oath happened during our Call-Up."
"You owe me three casings. The Oath happened during our Call-Up."

languages.text: “你欠我三枚弹壳。誓言是在我们被征召那会儿立下的。”
languages.original_text: "You owe me three casings. The Oath happened during our Call-Up."

traits.locale_text: “你欠我三枚弹壳。誓言是在我们被征召那会儿立下的。”

languages.text: "Bana üç kovan borçlusun. Yemin, bizim Sevk Grubumuza denk geldi."
languages.original_text: "You owe me three casings. The Oath happened during our Call-Up."

traits.locale_text: "Bana üç kovan borçlusun. Yemin, bizim Sevk Grubumuza denk geldi."

languages.text: « Tu me dois trois douilles. Le serment a été renouvelé pendant notre Mobilisation. »
languages.original_text: "You owe me three casings. The Oath happened during our Call-Up."

traits.locale_text: « Tu me dois trois douilles. Le serment a été renouvelé pendant notre Mobilisation. »

languages.text: «Me debes tres casquillos. El Juramento se ha cumplido durante nuestro llamado».
languages.original_text: "You owe me three casings. The Oath happened during our Call-Up."

traits.locale_text: «Me debes tres casquillos. El Juramento se ha cumplido durante nuestro llamado».

languages.text: "Du schuldest mir drei Umhüllungen. Der Eid wurde während unserer Einberufung geleistet."
languages.original_text: "You owe me three casings. The Oath happened during our Call-Up."

traits.locale_text: "Du schuldest mir drei Umhüllungen. Der Eid wurde während unserer Einberufung geleistet."

languages.text: 「お前は俺に薬莢三つ借りがある。あの誓いは、俺たちの召集のときに立てられたんだからな」
languages.original_text: "You owe me three casings. The Oath happened during our Call-Up."

traits.locale_text: 「お前は俺に薬莢三つ借りがある。あの誓いは、俺たちの召集のときに立てられたんだからな」
